# Generative AI — large language model (LLM) developers

![rw-book-cover](https://app.cbinsights.com/favicon.ico)

## Metadata
- Author: [[cbinsights.com]]
- Full Title: Generative AI — large language model (LLM) developers
- Category: #articles
- Summary: The generative AI market focuses on large language models (LLMs) that help businesses create applications for tasks like content generation and sentiment analysis. Companies can customize these models for specific needs while ensuring safety and ethical AI use. Major players in this market include Google, OpenAI, IBM, and Databricks.
- URL: https://app.cbinsights.com/market-report/1710?tab=overview

## Full Document
#### About this market

The generative AI — large language model (LLM) developers market offers foundation models and APIs that enable enterprises to build natural language processing applications for a number of functions. These include content creation, summarization, classification, chat, sentiment analysis, and more. Enterprises can fine-tune and customize these large-scale language models — which are pre-trained on vast amounts of text — for their specific use cases.

##### Key features to expect:

* Focus on developing generative AI technologies for safe artificial general intelligence.
* Offer large language models that produce human-like text using deep learning.
* Prioritize safety and research in the development of general AI systems and language models.
* Provide open-source libraries and frameworks for building, training, and deploying language models.
* Utilize machine learning to capture semantic information, analyze text, execute complex user requests, and improve data models for natural language processing applications.

Who buys this technology?

* Director of Artificial Intelligence (AI)

Who does this technology serve?

* Research institutions

#### Top Vendors

EXECUTION STRENGTH ➡MARKET STRENGTH ➡HIGHFLIERLEADERCHALLENGEROUTPERFORMER##### Featured Leaders

* Google is a technology company that provides internet-related services and products. Its offerings include a search engine, online advertising platforms, cloud computing solutions, software development tools, and hardware devices. Google serves sectors of the economy with its technology solutions. It was founded in 1998 and is based in Mountain View, California.
* OpenAI is an artificial intelligence research and deployment company that focuses on ensuring that AI benefits all of humanity. The company's main offerings include developing AI technologies with a commitment to safety, alignment with human values, and broad societal benefits. OpenAI's products and services are designed to address global challenges and promote the equitable distribution of AI advantages. It was founded in 2015 and is based in San Francisco, California.
* IBM operates in artificial intelligence, automation, and hybrid cloud solutions across various sectors. The company provides services including AI technologies for business, consulting for operations, and management of IT infrastructure. IBM also focuses on cybersecurity, data analytics, and quantum computing. IBM was formerly known as the Computing-Tabulating-Recording Company. It was founded in 1911 and is based in Armonk, New York.
* Databricks is a data and AI company that specializes in unifying data, analytics, and artificial intelligence across various industries. The company offers a platform that facilitates data management, governance, real-time analytics, and the building and deployment of machine learning and AI applications. Databricks serves sectors such as financial services, healthcare, public sector, retail, and manufacturing, among others. It was founded in 2013 and is based in San Francisco, California.

The AI agent development platforms market offers solutions for enterprises to develop and launch AI agents based on foundation models. Some vendors offer “drag-and-drop” interfaces and other no-code or low-code solutions that enable teams without in-depth technical expertise to build and deploy AI agents.

[AI agent development platforms](https://app.cbinsights.com/market-report/2728)

[AI development platforms](https://app.cbinsights.com/market-report/1307)

The AI development platforms market offers solutions that serve as one-stop shops for enterprises that want to develop and launch in-house AI projects. Vendors in this space enable organizations to manage all aspects of the AI lifecycle — from data preparation, training, and validation to model deployment and continuous monitoring — through a single platform in order to facilitate end-to-end model development. Some vendors offer “drag-and-drop” interfaces or “plug-and-play” solutions that enable teams without in-depth AI expertise to build AI projects.

[AI development platforms](https://app.cbinsights.com/market-report/1307)

[Small language models (SLMs) tools & development](https://app.cbinsights.com/market-report/2527)

The Small Language Models (SLMs) tools and development market focuses on the creation, optimization, and deployment of smaller-scale language models. These models, while less complex and resource-intensive than large language models (LLMs) like GPT-4, offer several advantages including cost-effectiveness, faster deployment times, and reduced computational requirements.

[Small language models (SLMs) tools & development](https://app.cbinsights.com/market-report/2527)

[Generative AI — image model developers](https://app.cbinsights.com/market-report/1718)

The generative AI — image model developers market offers foundation models and APIs for the production of visual content from scratch. These models learn from vast amounts of training data and can generate high-quality images and videos that mimic patterns and structures present in the training set. Models like generative adversarial networks (GANs) and diffusion models allow users to tailor output attributes, such as image style, content, and facial expressions, as they see fit.

[Generative AI — image model developers](https://app.cbinsights.com/market-report/1718)
